mapper.sql: select id, transfer_code, asset_id, asset_name, asset_code, out_dept_id, in_dept_id, transfer_date, business_status, proc_inst_id, proc_def_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from asset_transfer
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN tr.proc_inst_id IS NULL OR tr.proc_inst_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft, SUM(CASE WHEN tr.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND t.ID_ IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN tr.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN tr.proc_inst_id IS NOT NULL AND hpi.END_TIME_ IS NOT NULL AND hv.BOOLEAN_ = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected FROM asset_transfer tr LEFT JOIN act_ru_task t ON tr.proc_inst_id = t.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN act_hi_procinst hpi ON tr.proc_inst_id = hpi.PROC_INST_ID_ LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT PROC_INST_ID_, BOOLEAN_ FROM act_hi_varinst hv1 WHERE hv1.NAME_ = 'approved' AND hv1.ID_ = (SELECT MAX(ID_) FROM act_hi_varinst hv2 WHERE hv2.PROC_INST_ID_ = hv1.PROC_INST_ID_ AND hv2.NAME_ = 'approved')) hv ON tr.proc_inst_id = hv.PROC_INST_ID_ WHERE tr.del_flag = '0'
